description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design with clean lines and a predominantly dark exterior. The property includes a spacious courtyard with a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by a tiled patio and outdoor seating, as well as a separate garage structure. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor areas. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered walkway with a pergola, and the landscaping includes a small tree and greenery near the pool. The building's facade combines dark cladding with lighter accent panels and fencing, creating a striking contrast. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear zones for living, recreation, and parking.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a dark exterior, large windows, a swimming pool, and a separate garage, featuring clean lines and a spacious courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered walkway with pergola, pool, patio, and garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool area, outdoor seating, and the back of the garage with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid wall, rooftop details, and a glimpse of the backyard greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, flat roof, and the open layout of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
